creator: paulbeard@gmail.com
text:
Well, there is obviously something else wrong here. The build stops in the same place (right after testing for pango). 

I just ran pkg delete librsvg2-rust and then checked pkgs: it came back clean so I see I didn't need it anyway. I assumed it was a dependency for something else but I guess not.

pkg check -Bdrs 
Checking all packages: 100%

Thanks for the help.
